en.title: Terra Classic - Independent, community-maintained information website for Terra Classic, LUNC & USTC
en.description: Independent community-maintained information website for Terra Classic: explore LUNC and USTC ecosystem resources, markets, roadmap, decentralization, open work, and builder links.

tr.title: Terra Classic - Terra Classic, LUNC ve USTC icin bagimsiz topluluk bilgi sitesi
tr.description: Terra Classic icin bagimsiz, topluluk tarafindan surdurulen bilgi sitesi: LUNC ve USTC ekosistem kaynaklarini, piyasalari, yol haritasini, merkeziyetsizligi, acik isleri ve gelistirici baglantilarini kesfedin.

en.title: Terra Classic Ecosystem Directory
en.description: Explore neutral Terra Classic ecosystem links: applications, wallets, bridges, validators, developer resources, infrastructure providers, and community tools.

tr.title: Terra Classic Ekosistem Dizini
tr.description: Tarafsiz Terra Classic ekosistem baglantilarini kesfedin: uygulamalar, cuzdanlar, kopruler, validatorler, gelistirici kaynaklari, altyapi saglayicilari ve topluluk araclari.

en.title: Terra Classic LUNC Markets
en.description: Explore neutral Terra Classic LUNC market links across centralized exchanges and decentralized swap routes.

tr.title: Terra Classic LUNC Piyasalari
tr.description: Merkezi borsalar ve merkeziyetsiz takas rotalari genelinde tarafsiz Terra Classic LUNC piyasa baglantilarini kesfedin.

en.title: Terra Classic Roadmap
en.description: Explore the Terra Classic decentralized roadmap: public L1 milestones and clearly labeled project-submitted L2 and community roadmap entries.

tr.title: Terra Classic Yol Haritasi
tr.description: Terra Classic merkeziyetsiz yol haritasini kesfedin: herkese acik L1 kilometre taslari ve acikca etiketlenmis proje tarafindan sunulan L2 ve topluluk yol haritasi kayitlari.

en.title: Terra Classic Decentralization
en.description: A detailed, source-aware guide to Terra Classic decentralization, validators, delegators, governance, and community-owned infrastructure.

tr.title: Terra Classic Merkeziyetsizlik
tr.description: Terra Classic merkeziyetsizligi, validatorler, delegatorler, yonetisim ve topluluga ait altyapi hakkinda ayrintili ve kaynak bilincine sahip bir rehber.

en.title: Open Work for Terra Classic Builders
en.description: Explore open Terra Classic work packages that independent builders, software houses, and contributors can prepare proposals or quotes for.

tr.title: Terra Classic Gelistiricileri Icin Acik Isler
tr.description: Bagimsiz gelistiricilerin, yazilim ekiplerinin ve katkilarda bulunanlarin teklif veya fiyat hazirlayabilecegi acik Terra Classic is paketlerini kesfedin.

en.title: Open Work Details for Terra Classic Builders
en.description: Review a Terra Classic open work package before preparing a public proposal or quote for community discussion and governance.

tr.title: Terra Classic Gelistiricileri Icin Acik Is Detaylari
tr.description: Topluluk tartismasi ve yonetisim icin herkese acik teklif veya fiyat hazirlamadan once bir Terra Classic acik is paketini inceleyin.
